title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer cannot log in to their account even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted payment using Visa ending 1234 but the transaction keeps failing.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download January invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer billing address shows incorrect city after updating profile.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after opening on Android devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but the amount has not been credited yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving the 2FA code on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer receives an upload failed error while changing profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal Issue
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal but the toggle option is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order but did not receive a confirmation email.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer reports that the password reset link expires immediately.

title: Shipping Address Not Updating
description: Customer cannot update the shipping address during checkout.

title: Coupon Code Not Working
description: Customer entered a valid coupon code but the discount is not applied.

title: Order Tracking Not Available
description: Customer cannot track their order because the tracking page shows an error.

title: Account Suspension Inquiry
description: Customer account was suspended without clear explanation.
